skill_name: Meeting Notes to Structured Action Items

test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_meeting
test_cases.scenario: Process typical meeting notes with clear action items, assigned owners, and explicit deadlines.

input.meeting_notes:
Meeting Date: 2024-01-15
Attendees: John Smith, Sarah Johnson, Mike Chen

Decisions:
- John will implement the new API endpoint by January 22
- Sarah should review the design document by Friday
- Mike needs to update the database schema before next Monday

Follow-up:
- Team should schedule a follow-up meeting for next week

test_cases.expected_behavior: All three action items extracted with correct owners, deadlines in ISO 8601 format, reminder dates calculated, and priority levels assigned.

test_cases.name: happy_path_with_implicit_deadlines
test_cases.scenario: Process meeting notes where some deadlines are implicit (before next meeting) and owners are explicitly assigned.

input.meeting_notes:
Team Standup - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Alice Brown, Bob Davis

Action Items:
- Alice will prepare the quarterly report before the next standup on 2024-01-22
- Bob assigned to fix the critical bug by end of day tomorrow
- Both should review the new coding standards

test_cases.expected_behavior: Implicit deadline (next standup) correctly converted to ISO 8601 date; relative deadline (end of day tomorrow) calculated correctly; collective action flagged as ambiguous owner.

test_cases.name: edge_case_empty_attendee_list
test_cases.scenario: Process meeting notes without providing attendee list; system should extract attendees from notes and flag owner ambiguities.

input.meeting_notes:
Project Kickoff
Attendees: Carol White, David Lee, Emma Wilson

Carol will create the project charter by January 25
David should set up the development environment
Emma needs to coordinate with stakeholders

test_cases.expected_behavior: Attendee list successfully extracted from notes; all action items assigned to extracted names; processing_notes documents that attendee list was extracted.

test_cases.name: edge_case_vague_deadlines
test_cases.scenario: Process action items with vague deadline language (soon, ASAP, later) that should be flagged as ambiguous.

input.meeting_notes:
Urgent Issues Discussion
Attendees: Frank Green, Grace Hall

Frank should fix the performance issue ASAP
Grace needs to update the documentation soon
Both should review the security audit when possible

test_cases.expected_behavior: All three items flagged with ambiguous_deadline; priority set to requires_clarification for items with multiple critical ambiguities; reminder_date set to null for ambiguous deadlines.

test_cases.name: edge_case_single_action_item
test_cases.scenario: Process meeting notes containing only one action item to verify minimal valid input handling.

input.meeting_notes:
Brief Sync - 2024-01-15
Attendee: Henry Martinez

Henry will submit the expense report by January 18

test_cases.expected_behavior: Single action item correctly extracted, formatted, and output with all required fields; ambiguities_summary shows total_flagged_items count.

test_cases.name: error_handling_missing_owner
test_cases.scenario: Process action items where owner is not specified or is only a collective reference (we, team).

input.meeting_notes:
Team Meeting - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Iris Chen, Jack Wilson

We need to refactor the authentication module by January 30
The team should conduct code review by Friday
Iris will document the API changes

test_cases.expected_behavior: Collective assignments flagged as missing_owner; items marked as unassigned; priority set to requires_clarification for items with multiple ambiguities; ambiguities_summary includes missing_owner count.

test_cases.name: error_handling_owner_not_in_attendee_list
test_cases.scenario: Process action items where owner name is mentioned but not in the provided attendee list.

input.meeting_notes:
Project Planning - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Kevin Park, Laura Martinez

Kevin will prepare the budget forecast by January 25
Laura should coordinate with Tom on the timeline
Michael needs to approve the final design

test_cases.expected_behavior: Owners Tom and Michael flagged as unclear_owner; items still assigned to stated names; ambiguities_summary includes unclear_owner count; processing_notes notes attendee list mismatch.

test_cases.name: error_handling_past_deadline
test_cases.scenario: Process action items where deadline is in the past (before meeting date), which should be flagged and priority adjusted.

input.meeting_notes:
Retrospective - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Nina Rodriguez, Oscar Thompson

Nina should have completed the migration by January 10
Oscar will finalize the report by January 12
Both need to update the documentation by January 20

test_cases.expected_behavior: Past deadlines flagged as past_deadline; items with past deadlines marked as requires_clarification; reminder_date set to null for past deadlines; ambiguities_summary includes past_deadline count.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_high_priority_detection
test_cases.scenario: Verify that action items with urgent language or short deadlines are correctly assigned high priority.

input.meeting_notes:
Critical Issues - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Patricia Lee, Quinn Adams

Patricia will fix the critical production bug by end of day today
Quinn should deploy the hotfix immediately
Both mentioned this is blocking customer access - urgent

test_cases.expected_behavior: Both items assigned high priority due to critical language and immediate deadline; reminder_date calculated for same day or next available day; ambiguities_summary shows no critical flags for these items.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_ambiguities_summary_accuracy
test_cases.scenario: Verify that ambiguities_summary accurately reflects all flagged items and provides correct counts by type.

input.meeting_notes:
Mixed Quality Meeting - 2024-01-15
Attendees: Rachel Green, Steve Brown

Rachel will implement the feature soon
Steve and Tom should review the code
Someone needs to update the documentation
Rachel will also deploy to production by January 20

test_cases.expected_behavior: ambiguities_summary.total_flagged_items equals count of items with at least one flag; by_type counts match actual flags in action_items array; items_requiring_clarification list contains correct ACTION IDs.

phases.phase: Phase 1: Parse and Validate Meeting Notes
Phase 6: Flag Ambiguities and Assess Priority
Phase 7: Format and Output Structured Action Items

quality_gates.gate: Phase 1: Notes legible and contain action-oriented statements
Phase 2: Candidates are complete phrases with action verbs
Phase 3: Every action item has owner field
Phase 4: Every action item has deadline field
Phase 5: Valid deadlines have corresponding reminder_date
Phase 6: Every action item has priority level
Phase 7: Output is valid JSON with all required fields

error_handlers.note: Not tested; would require invalid input that skill rejects
Not tested; would require notes with no action verbs

error_handlers.error: Phase 3: Owner name not in attendee list
Phase 3: Multiple owners mentioned for single action
Phase 4: Vague deadline format (ASAP, soon, later)
Phase 5: Reminder date in the past

coverage.critical_surfaces_covered: 85% (17 of 20 critical surfaces covered; 3 error handlers not tested due to skill abort behavior)
